name: Access Community
description_short: Member-owned credit union serving Potter and Randall counties in Amarillo, Texas, offering checking, savings, loans, and mortgages with community focus since 1953.
description_long:
Access Community Credit Union was founded in 1953 as Public Service Employees Credit Union by Southwestern Public Service Company employees. The organization operates as a not-for-profit cooperative under the foundational mission of "people helping people." It was rebranded as Access Credit Union in 1999 when membership expanded to select employer groups, and received its community charter in July 2003, opening membership to anyone living, working, worshiping, or attending school in Potter or Randall counties in the Amarillo, Texas area.

Access Community Credit Union provides a full suite of consumer financial products including checking and savings accounts, personal loans, auto loans, home loans, home equity loans, debt consolidation loans, mortgages, credit cards, CDs (up to 3.75% APY), online and mobile banking, and investment services. The credit union maintains 4 branch locations throughout Amarillo and provides access to over 40 ATMs locally and 50,000 ATMs nationwide through its network partnerships.

The credit union distinguishes itself through its local decision-making structure, personalized member service, and demonstrated community commitment. Since 2019, Access has allocated over $400,000 to community outreach through direct service and gifts to nonprofit partners. The organization emphasizes "member-focused" decision-making and provides what it calls "trusted advice" as a core service philosophy. The credit union has doubled in asset size in recent decades while maintaining this community-centered approach.

As a federally insured credit union regulated by the NCUA with NMLS #402791, Access Community Credit Union operates under standard federal oversight and safety regulations. Members should note membership is limited to the geographic field of service (Potter and Randall counties), and the institution is not available to all consumers nationwide. The organization has taken active steps toward digital accessibility compliance with WCAG 2.0 guidelines.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) up to 3.75% APY
pros: Member-owned not-for-profit structure returns profits to members through competitive rates and lower fees
Over 50,000 ATMs nationwide available to members despite being a small regional credit union
Documented community investment: $400,000+ allocated to community outreach since 2019
NCUA federal deposit insurance and Excess Share Insurance (ESI) coverage protects member deposits
4 physical branch locations in Amarillo with extended member service hours and local decision-making
Competitive CD rates (up to 3.75% APY) and loan products including home equity and debt consolidation
Online and mobile banking platform with accessibility compliance efforts
cons: Membership restricted to those living, working, worshiping, or attending school in Potter or Randall counties only
Limited to 4 branch locations in Amarillo; not a nationwide institution for in-person services
Website does not publicly display current loan rates, savings rates, or fee schedules for comparison
Specific credit card rewards and competitive details not detailed on website
Field of membership restriction makes this unavailable to most U.S. consumers outside the Amarillo area
best_for: Amarillo-area residents and employees seeking local, personalized financial services with community values
Members prioritizing not-for-profit structure and competitive rates over national brand convenience
Consumers within Potter or Randall counties seeking full-service banking including mortgages and business lending
diagnosis: Access Community Credit Union is best for residents and employees in the Amarillo area (Potter and Randall counties) seeking local, member-owned banking with demonstrated community commitment. The main caveat is strict geographic membership restrictions that exclude the vast majority of U.S. consumers outside the service area, making this a community-specific institution rather than a national credit union alternative.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Access Community — Credit Union in Amarillo, TX | CreditDoc
meta_description: Access Community — NCUA-insured credit union in Amarillo, TX. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
